title: 16th Birthday Decorations for Boys, Blue Age 16 Balloon, Blue 32 Inch Number 16 Foil Balloons with Happy Birthday Banner, Star Confetti Balloon for 16th Party Boy
features: Age 16th Birthday Balloon Decoration: 1 Happy Birthday Banner, 32'' number 16 balloon, 12 balloon (2 x blue confetti, 4 x blue, 2 x white ), 4 star foil balloon ( 2 x blue, 2 x silver). These balloons of blue and white,add a bright and cheerful touch to any birthday party decor
Quality: All blue and white birthday balloons are made of natural rubber and aluminum foil. Durable. You can use ordinary air to inflate or hydrogen to make the balloon fly higher

Birthday Decoration for Boys: Happy Birthday foil balloons on a wall, fence, table and window. The birthday decoration set will create a backdrop for your child party, everyone at the party will be impressed with the decorations
Blue Confetti Balloons: Rub the confetti balloon to make it stick to the surface of the balloon. Must be an unforgettable 16th birthday decorations boy memory, these balloons are sure to stand out
16th Birthday Decorations for Boy: 16th birthday balloons suit for baby shower, 16th birthday party decoration, blue birthday party, wedding, and other celebrations event
